Message: Compose showcase renders Overview / Controls / Forms / Collections / Overlays / Styles.
Compose forms block shows required, pattern, password, and textarea validation surfaces.
Compose appearance block shows backdrop blur, filter blur, flex wrap, RTL text, and image skin samples.
Compose selector and stack labs validate advanced selectors plus transformed z-index hit alignment.
Compose Phase 2 visual lab shows multi-background, multi-shadow, dashed border, mask, and clip-path in one native card.
Compose Phase 3 text lab shows multilingual copy, RTL alignment, ellipsis, and text decoration in one native panel.
Compose Phase 4 image lab shows CSS background-image url, SVG image rendering, and native canvas drawing in one panel.
Compose Phase 5 keyframe lab captures the initial animation state from CSS files.
Compose keyframe lab advances to a deterministic mid-frame.
Compose Phase 5 keyframe lab shows mid-animation color, blur, and opacity interpolation.
Compose keyframe lab reaches the deterministic end frame.
Compose Phase 5 keyframe lab shows the finite animation end state and alternate fill behavior.
Compose transition probe enters focus state on the same DOM node.
Compose transition runtime advances native tween interpolation.
Compose transition probe shows mid-animation color and opacity interpolation.
Compose scroll host consumes native wheel input.
Compose scroll container clips content, updates offsets, and keeps clip host bounded.
Compose switches selected collection item.
Compose collection card shows selected state and auto-sized table columns.
Compose table block shows native table semantics, content-aware columns, rowspan, and colspan.
Compose opens modal overlay.
Compose overlay state becomes visible.
